overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through Night City. The player navigates a futuristic vehicle through neon-lit commercial districts, transitions through a sunlit elevated highway section with palm trees, passes through a distinctive red-walled tunnel, and stops at a city intersection. The footage features high-quality ray-traced lighting with prominent pink and cyan neon signage against modern glass architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with elevated highways

events.description: approaching pedestrian crosswalk with traffic lights at intersection

agents.ego_description: driving through multi-lane neon-lit city street, passing commercial billboards and elevated highway structures

entered.detail: small decorative figure on the car dashboard visible throughout the drive
large illuminated cola advertisement on building facade
futuristic elevated highway structure with green support beams
tall futuristic towers with reflective glass surfaces
zebra crossing lines painted on the asphalt road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from the driver's seat of a futuristic vehicle navigating a neon-lit commercial boulevard. The dashboard bobblehead is visible as the car approaches a crosswalk at 6 seconds. Elevated highway ramps and glass skyscrapers frame the wide multi-lane road, with sparse pedestrian presence and light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit elevated highway with palm trees and modern architecture

events.description: transitioning from neon-lit dusk to bright sunlight as vehicle emerges from urban canyon
re-entering darker shadowed area as vehicle passes under overpasses

agents.ego_description: accelerating on elevated highway through sunlit section with palm trees and modern glass towers visible

notable_agents.action: red pickup truck driving ahead on the highway maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the highway indicating a warmer climate zone
modern skyscrapers with reflective glass facades catching sunlight
metal safety barriers along the elevated highway edge
concrete highway overpass structure casting shadows on the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from the neon-lit district into a brightly sunlit elevated highway section at 12 seconds, with palm trees and modern glass towers becoming visible. The lighting shifts dramatically from artificial neon to natural sunlight, then back to shadows as the car passes under overpasses. A red pickup truck is visible ahead on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed highway tunnel with red structural walls and artificial lighting

events.description: entering covered highway tunnel with distinctive red painted structural walls
passing under orange fluorescent tunnel ceiling lights creating warm ambient glow

agents.ego_description: driving through enclosed tunnel with red walls and artificial lighting, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: distinctive red painted concrete walls of the highway tunnel
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the tunnel ceiling
illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the tunnel wall
structural archway marking the tunnel entrance with signage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered highway tunnel at 22 seconds, characterized by distinctive red structural walls and artificial lighting. The environment shifts from open sky to fully enclosed space with orange ceiling lights creating a warm ambient glow. Digital billboards are visible on the tunnel walls as the vehicle progresses toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with street-level shops and pedestrian crossings

events.description: exiting tunnel back into open neon-lit commercial streets with ground-level storefronts
stopping at red traffic light at pedestrian intersection with crossing signals

agents.ego_description: navigating through commercial streets and stopping at intersection with pedestrians crossing the road

notable_agents.action: pedestrian waiting at the crosswalk corner preparing to cross
pedestrian actively crossing the street in front of the vehicle

entered.detail: ground-level shops with illuminated signs and display windows
retail establishments at sidewalk level with awnings and signage
marked pedestrian crossing at the street intersection with signal lights
bright pink and cyan neon signs in Japanese and English characters

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel at 33 seconds, the vehicle returns to open neon-lit commercial streets with ground-level storefronts and moderate pedestrian activity. The scene features dense urban architecture with bright signage. The vehicle approaches an intersection and stops at a red light at 40 seconds, allowing pedestrians to cross the street in front of the car.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a futuristic cityscape that shifts from neon-lit boulevards to sun-drenched highways and enclosed tunnels before returning to the urban core. It begins from the driver's seat of a vehicle navigating a commercial district framed by glass skyscrapers and elevated ramps, with a bobblehead visible on the dashboard. As the car accelerates, the artificial neon glow gives way to bright natural sunlight on an elevated highway lined with palm trees and modern towers, momentarily dipping into shadow beneath overpasses. The scene then shifts into a fully enclosed highway tunnel characterized by distinctive red walls and warm orange ceiling lights, passing digital billboards before emerging back into the open air. Finally, the vehicle returns to the dense urban architecture of neon-lit streets and storefronts, eventually coming to a halt at a red light as pedestrians cross the intersection.
